svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: var(--ge-adaptive-bg, #ffffff); color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(240, 255, 240), rgb(12, 25, 12)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 138, 0), rgb(67, 186, 67));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 498px; height: 1px; padding-top: 23px; margin-left: 613px;
